title: PlanBench
description: Evaluate direct PlanBench task_1 plan generation in the unified dataset runtime as an answer-adapter task with upstream-compatible text_to_plan parsing plus semantic VAL validation.
baseline_summary: A placeholder answer-adapter that returns no plan for the active PlanBench prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher valid-plan rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. This task uses the unified dataset runtime, but it is not an exact-match answer task. Treat solve(question: dict) as the answer-adapter boundary: it receives the public PlanBench prompt payload and must return plan text that the upstream task_1 text_to_plan parser can extract and semantically validate against the official instance. You may return either a list[str] with one official-style action line per step or a newline-separated string of official-style action lines. Return natural-language or official object-token action text accepted by PlanBench task_1 parsing; do not return parenthesized PDDL. Preserve the declared helper symbols when useful. Do not use browsing or external network access.
